description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist rectangular design. The front facade features large floor-to-ceiling windows and three distinct entry doors, each leading to separate sections of the house. There are two paved patios at the front, one of which includes a driveway with a parked car and a gated entrance. The rear of the house has private outdoor spaces, including a covered patio area with an awning. The exterior walls are finished in a dark gray material, contrasting with the white roof and window frames. The interior layout is visible from above, showing multiple rooms furnished with modern amenities.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large front windows, and dual patios, including a driveway with a car. The exterior is dark gray with white accents and features spacious, open interiors.
description_view_0: Front view showing three entry doors, large vertical windows, two patios, and a driveway with a car.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, garage area, and partial visibility of interior rooms and furnishings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying private outdoor spaces, a covered patio with an awning, and multiple back windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional patios, side windows, and a glimpse into the interior layout.
attribute_window_arrangement: large picture windows, vertical strips, asymmetrical placement
attribute_entryway_design: Three main entry doors with steps, large glass panels, and two paved patios; one entry features a gated driveway.
